mission

Coney Island Amusement Park

An Episode 3 main mission centered on a Cleaner presence at Coney Island's amusement park.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Cleaner presence

The amusement park mission brings the returning Cleaners into Episode 3 and frames their presence through the faction's virus-eradication doctrine. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    Coney Island Amusement Park is one of the two main missions introduced with Episode 3. [1]

  2. confirmed

    The Cleaners are sighted at the amusement park while pursuing their campaign to eradicate traces of the virus. [1]

  1. [1] Episode 3: Coney Island Live Now! — Ubisoft (2020-02-12). Accessed 2026-07-19.
